ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units_of_measurement" (
  "um_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "um_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement (e.g., KG) */,
  "um_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("um_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Grains) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Rice - Retail) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "um_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_um_id FOREIGN KEY ("um_id") REFERENCES units_of_measurement ("um_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., National Average) */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., National, State, City) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_records" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the price belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the price was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the price was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_records_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_records_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_change_records" (
  "price_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the price change occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the price change occurred */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_change_records_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES price_records ("price_id")
)
